body:
Title: CRA Form T1212 2025 Statement of Deferred Security Options Benefits.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t1212/t1212-25e.pdf

CRA T1212 2025 reports deferred security options benefits. Normalized numeric values used by the encoded formulas include 0.50. Line 1 is the opening balance of deferred security options benefits from the previous year's notice of assessment or reassessment. Line 2 is benefits that can no longer be deferred and is entered on line 10100 of the return. Line 3 is the closing balance of deferred security options benefits: line 1 minus line 2. Note 1 says that to claim the security options deduction on line 2, enter 50% of line 2 on line 24900 of the return, encoded as 0.50.

heading: CRA Form T1212 2025 Statement of Deferred Security Options Benefits
